data.title: Trump Wants No Tax For Americans Making Less Than $150,000 A Year, Says Howard Lutnick: 'That's What I'm Working For'
data.description: Trump Wants No Tax For Anybody Making Less Than $150,000 a year, Says Howard Lutnick. 'That's What I'm Working For'

data.title: Marjorie Taylor Greene Demands FBI Probe Into 'Wave Of Organized Attacks' On Tesla —Questions Possible Democrat-NGO Ties
data.description: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) and fellow House Subcommittee on Delivering on Government Efficiency members have called for a federal investigation into what they describe as "organized attacks" targeting Tesla Inc. and CEO Elon Musk, questioning potential connections to Democrat-leaning organizations.

data.title: Peter Schiff Warns Americans Will Be Harmed Most When Bitcoin Bubble Pops, Says US Has Biggest Crypto Lobby
data.description: Economist and market commentator Peter Schiff warned on Wednesday that Americans would bear the brunt of the impact should the Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) “bubble” burst.

data.title: Mark Cuban Hints That This One Mistake Has Killed Too Many Shark Tank Deals: 'Thought They Were Profitable And They Weren't'
data.description: Mark Cuban warned that many small business owners on Shark Tank mistakenly believe they're profitable, only to unravel during due diligence — a common oversight he says continues to kill deals and highlights a widespread failure to understand key financial metrics.

data.title: Palantir's $4 Million ARPC Estimate 'Flawed,' Says 'Pharma Bro' Martin Shkreli, But 'I Wouldn't Bet Against Them'
data.description: Martin Shkreli, the controversial former hedge fund manager known as "Pharma Bro," questioned but ultimately defended Palantir Technologies Inc.'s growth projections on Wednesday, calling analysis of the company's $4 million average revenue per customer "flawed."
